name: Notice
description: An inline alert banner for displaying feedback messages such as errors, warnings, success confirmations, or informational notices.
instructions: Use variant to set intent (default, highlight, positive, danger, warning). Use emphasis='strong' for high-visibility banners and 'weak' for subtle inline notices. Provide an icon ReactNode to add a leading icon. Provide an action ReactNode (typically a Button) for actionable notices. Provide onDismiss to show a dismiss button. Children is the message content.
